facebook.caption:
Tourists keep walking past this pho spot. Locals sit down. Big difference.

Phở Bắc Bình Nam Định cơ sở 5 on Đường Bạch Đằng is not on any resort map. Northern-style pho, proper broth, fast service. The kind of place that fills up with regulars before 8am.

4.6 stars. 36 reviews. All locals.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Bowl hits the table in under 3 minutes. Northern pho, Phu Quoc prices, zero tourists in sight. Phở Bắc Bình Nam Định cơ sở 5 on Đường Bạch Đằng is doing something right.

instagram.caption:
